description: M6 solver_required parking lot (G4 schema ruling): spots rejected during v4.5.1 seed design because the verdict hinges on an exact ratio that cannot be derived from visible combos. HARD-BLOCKED from production until a real solver run exists (would then carry sourceConfidence=consensus_gto + solverRunRef).

spots.sketch: KQ top pair K-kicker on Kh 7c 2d / 9s / 4h, thin-value bet vs check
spots.whySolverRequired: The turn 9 promotes K9 (a real BB defend) to two pair while KJ/KT remain the dominated callers; the verdict flips on the exact ratio of promoted-K9-that-check-calls vs dominated-Kx-that-calls, and no blocker or line argument settles it qualitatively.

spots.sketch: A-high with meaningful showdown value on low, draw-light runouts, bluff vs check
spots.whySolverRequired: When villain's check-call range keeps enough unpaired floats, ace-high's showdown weight is nontrivial and bluff-vs-check becomes a pure frequency split; unlike the shipped C rows (zero-SDV heroes) no dominance argument exists.

spots.sketch: Scare-card overbet bluff on Ts 6s 2d / 3c / Ad with busted spade QsJs
spots.whySolverRequired: The river A simultaneously improves villain's A-float region and unlocks hero's AK/AQ rep; whether the bluff prints depends on the exact density of A-high floats that peeled two streets -- a ratio question, not a combo question.
